original_statement: the construction of how many locations was cancelled in 1988?
mutated_statement: the something of how many places was affected in 1988?
mutation_analysis: Entity placeholder + Synonym substitution + Action-verb generalization: "construction" → "something" (specific noun replaced by vague placeholder) | "locations" → "places" (lexical synonym/paraphrase) | "cancelled" → "affected" (specific cancellation generalized to broader affect)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“Interpreting 'affected in 1988' as entries where the status mentions cancellations in 1988”及列出的四项（chernobyl-5/6, ignalina-3/4），Agent直接把“affected”理解为“cancelled”，并给出确定答案4。日志中无任何关于问题模糊性、不确定性或澄清请求的表述，也未表达不确定语气或提出假设前提。由于Agent没有识别到原问题由具体名词向模糊占位词和动词泛化引起的不明确性，直接按自身理解处理并返回具体结果，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
